caption: A man is seated in a studio setting, positioned behind a dark desk. He wears a white baseball cap, a black sweatshirt with the word "BOSS" in gold lettering, and a gold watch and chain. He is wearing headphones and speaking into a professional microphone on a boom arm. Behind him is a white backdrop featuring a logo with five gold stars and the words "UNICORN HUSTLE." A blue sign above him reads "Where BOSSES Talk!" and a red sign reads "TALK 101." A black mug with red text that says "TALK 101" is on the desk. Across the sequence, the man remains in a similar seated position, slightly shifting his head and facial expression as he speaks, while the camera angle and surroundings remain static. A small logo is visible in the bottom-left corner of each frame.
